meanings.definition: take on a certain form, attribute, or aspect
examples: His voice took on a sad tone
The story took a new turn
he adopted an air of superiority
The gods assume human or animal form in these fables

meanings.definition: take on titles, offices, duties, responsibilities
examples: When will the new President assume office?

meanings.definition: admit into a group or community
examples: We'll have to vote on whether or not to admit a new member

meanings.definition: contend against an opponent in a sport, game, or battle
